sections.paragraph:
ὑπεραγάλλομαι dep. rejoice/exult greatly ὑπεραγαλλόμενος with the highest joy IPhld 5:1.

dep. dep. = deponent

IPhld IPhld = Ignatius to the Philadelphians—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1031
